li.label: Luxandra's amusement
li.description: I have this warm feeling that some unseen entity just watched our private moments and was entertained. It's a bit shameless, but... honestly, it's kinda hot.

li.label: Luxandra's judgment
li.description: There's a faint, judgmental prickle in the back of my mind, like a distant deity is staring down at us and sighing deeply at how utterly prudish and boring we're being.
